confidence_rationale: This video contains educational/instructional content about FES program implementation, not an FLS task performance that can be scored
cannot_determine: Task performance - video shows educational slides rather than hands-on FLS task execution
technique_summary: This is an instructional presentation about implementing the Fundamentals of Endoscopic Surgery (FES) program for surgical residents, covering differences from FLS, training resources, and implementation strategies.

demonstrated_techniques: Use of simulation models including Kyoto model for loop reduction training
Integration of virtual reality simulation with GI Mentor
STEP (Surgical Training for Endoscopic Proficiency) model implementation
common_errors_addressed: Clarifies that FES residents cannot train on modules assessed in skills portion unlike FLS
Emphasizes need for dedicated training curriculum since no officially endorsed training exists
